metadata.description: A blank template to get started with Payload 3.0

metadata.scriptContent: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=12000" NEXT_DISABLE_SWC_MINIFY=1 NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 next build
pnpm run test:int && pnpm run test:e2e
cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --no-experimental-strip-types" pnpm exec playwright test
